productDisplayName: Salomon Men X Ultra Black Sports Shoes
description: Style Note salomon X Ultra trail running shoes performs well on all terrains, be it the mountains, water streams or a campsite. The design considerations and materials make the pair a tough, yet comfy foot wear option while braving the elements. The brand's trademark Sensifit secures the in-steps and locks the foot in place while the polyester lining takes the moisture out. The Gore-Tex seam-sealed inner booties gives the wearer's feet good breathability. These shoes also balance well between weight and stability. Product Details 3D Advanced Chassis between the midsole and outsole maximizes energy control and push-through performance Quicklace system tightens with a single pull Sensifit upper construction connects to the lace-points for a secure, wrapped Fit Energy Cell midsole enhancement controls pronation Gusseted tongue won’t pinch or bunch Rubber toe cap protects your toes from rocks and roots Material and Care Synthetic, fabric Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in sunlight
